section_2.title: Membership tiers & exclusive offers

questions.question: How do I add a new table?
questions.answer: Navigate to the Tables page and click the 'Add Table' button in the top right. Fill in the table details including number, capacity, and area, then save.

questions.question: How to process a new order?
questions.answer: Go to Orders page, click 'New Order', select the table, add menu items, and confirm. The order will be sent to the kitchen automatically.

questions.question: How do I manage staff schedules?
questions.answer: In the Staff section, click on a staff member's profile and select 'Schedule'. You can assign shifts, set working hours, and manage time-off requests.

questions.question: How to update menu items?
questions.answer: Go to Menu page, find the item you want to update, click the Edit button. You can change name, price, description, availability, and category.

questions.question: How do I generate reports?
questions.answer: Visit the Analytics page and select the type of report you need (sales, revenue, inventory). Choose the date range and click 'Generate Report'.

questions.question: How to handle payment processing?
questions.answer: When an order is completed, click on the order and select 'Process Payment'. Choose payment method (cash, card, or digital) and confirm the transaction.

questions.question: How do I change my password?
questions.answer: Go to Settings > Security tab. Enter your current password, then your new password twice, and click 'Update Password'.

questions.question: How to manage table reservations?
questions.answer: In the Tables page, click on a table and select 'Reserve'. Enter customer details, reservation time, and number of guests. The table status will update automatically.

hero.title: Optimize restaurant operations with XFoodi
hero.description: Manage tables, orders, kitchen, inventory and reports on a single platform.

about.description: Restaurant Platform was born from a simple mission: to empower restaurateurs with technology that feels as natural as their craft. We bridge the gap between traditional hospitality and modern efficiency, helping you focus on what matters most—great food and happy customers.

features.description: All the tools you need to run your restaurant – in one intuitive interface.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Watch sales data flow into charts and reports in real time.

tables.title: Tables
tables.description: Monitor table maps and serving status instantly across all areas.

menu.title: Menu
menu.description: Admins create dishes, update menus, and customers see changes immediately.

reservations.title: Reservations
reservations.description: Customers book tables, admins process requests, and staff check in with a clear flow.

customer.title: Customer
customer.description: Track order history, returning guests, and loyalty data for each customer.

staff_ops.title: Staff Ops
staff_ops.description: KDS and operating workflow for staff, kitchen, and admins in one screen.

table_management.title: Smart Table Management
table_management.description: Automatic table reservation system with intuitive interface, helping optimize table layout and reduce waiting time for customers.

order_kot.title: Seamless Order & KOT
order_kot.description: Sync orders from waiter to kitchen instantly. Track dish status in real-time and minimize errors.

inventory.title: Inventory Management
inventory.description: Accurate inventory control, low stock alerts, and optimize purchasing costs according to business cycles.

reports.title: Real-time Reports
reports.description: Dashboard analyzing revenue, best-selling dishes, staff performance. All data updated in real-time.

multi_branch.title: Multi-branch
multi_branch.description: Manage multiple stores on one system. Sync menu, pricing and aggregate centralized reports.

integration.title: Flexible Integration
integration.description: Connect with payment gateways, delivery, accounting and third-party apps via open API.

workflow.title: How Restaurant Platform works in your restaurant
workflow.description: From table booking to bill settlement, every step is supported by Restaurant Platform.

setup.title: Restaurant & Menu Setup
setup.description: Configure restaurant info, create menu, set up tables and staff permissions in minutes.

operation.title: Operation & Real-time Sync
operation.description: Receive orders, process payments, send orders to kitchen automatically. All changes updated instantly on all devices.

analysis.title: Analysis & Optimization
analysis.description: View detailed reports on revenue, best sellers, costs. Use data to make smarter business decisions.

testimonials.title: What restaurants say about Restaurant Platform?
testimonials.description: Hundreds of restaurant owners and managers have trusted Restaurant Platform to optimize their operations.

nam.quote: Restaurant Platform has completely changed how we operate. From table reservations to inventory management, everything is automated and much more accurate.

huong.quote: I used to spend hours aggregating reports from 5 branches. Now with Restaurant Platform, all data is available on the dashboard in a few clicks.

tuan.quote: Simple interface, staff learns very quickly. Stable system, never encountered errors during peak hours. Recommend for every restaurant!

lan.quote: We love the real-time sync feature. Orders from app to kitchen in just 1 second, customers are very satisfied with service speed.

footer.tagline: Next generation restaurant operations platform. Helping you manage every aspect of your restaurant on a single system.

cta.title: Create your restaurant website in 5 minutes
cta.description: Set up a fully automated and professional restaurant system from A-Z without needing a tech team.

features_alt.title: All the operations tools in your hands
features_alt.description: More than just management software, XFoodi provides an end-to-end suite to automate the dining journey.

qr_menu.title: Smart QR Menu & Ordering
qr_menu.desc: Guests scan QR codes at tables to order, view bills, and pay online via dynamic PayOS without downloading apps or waiting.

crm.title: CRM & Customer Loyalty
crm.desc: Store dining history, track points automatically, advance loyalty tiers, and launch appreciation rewards to retain guests.

marketing.title: Automated Marketing (Remarketing)
marketing.desc: Set up trigger flows for birthday vouchers, SMS/Email follow-ups, and remarketing campaigns to boost repeat visits.

journey.title: Seamless 360° Operations Flow
journey.description: See how your diners and kitchen synchronize effortlessly via XFoodi's automated system.

multitenant.title: One Platform - Thousands of Independent Tenants
multitenant.description: XFoodi utilizes Multi-Tenant SaaS technology for complete data isolation. Every restaurant runs as a separate entity with custom configs.

case_studies.title: Trusted by industry-leading brands
case_studies.description: Discover how our F&B partners optimize workflows and scale with XFoodi.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.description: No hidden fees. Choose the plan that fits your restaurant scale.

starter.title: Starter
starter.desc: Basic solution for small shops starting to digitize

business.title: Business
business.desc: Optimize operations and automate marketing campaigns

enterprise.title: Enterprise
enterprise.desc: Dedicated infrastructure and customized tools for chains

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find quick answers to common questions about the platform.

items.a: XFoodi is a Multi-tenant SaaS platform built for F&B. Upon signing up, you instantly get your own website, kitchen order system, digital table maps, online menus, and integrated CRM marketing automation.

items.q: Can I use my own custom domain?
items.a: Yes, on Business and Enterprise plans, you can easily connect your restaurant's custom domain (e.g., phohung.com) instead of a sub-domain.

items.q: How does PayOS payment work on XFoodi?
items.a: We integrate the PayOS payment gateway to generate dynamic transaction QR codes for bills. Diners simply scan with their banking app to pay instantly. Money goes directly to your bank account, and the table frees up automatically.

items.q: Does the system support mobile phones and tablets?
items.a: Yes, the admin panel, KDS screen, and waiter order views are fully responsive and run smoothly on desktops, laptops, tablets, and smartphones.
We employ a Multi-Tenant architecture with strictly isolated databases for each restaurant (tenant). Your client databases, menus, revenues, and reports are fully secure and isolated.

hero.title: Exquisite Tastes

Each dish is carefully prepared with the freshest ingredients, creating a special flavor found nowhere else. We sincerely thank you for your support.

about.subtitle: Our Story

about.secondary_description: Each dish is carefully prepared with the freshest ingredients, creating distinct flavors found nowhere else. We sincerely thank you for your support.

news.description: Don't miss out on special offers and culinary events.

booking.table_preview_desc: Preview of the selected table area.

admin_note.title: Admin View

help.title: Need Help?
help.description: To modify or cancel your reservation, please contact the restaurant directly.

how_it_works.title: How It Works
how_it_works.description: Three simple steps to unlock your restaurant data

data_collection.title: Data Collection
data_collection.description: Data comes from orders, payments and customer interactions — streamed in real-time.

smart_aggregation.title: Smart Aggregation
smart_aggregation.description: Charts aggregate by day, table, and category with interactive drill-down capabilities.

actionable_insights.title: Actionable Insights
actionable_insights.description: Admins review trends, identify opportunities, and act on data-driven insights.

interactive.title: See revenue with real clarity
interactive.description: Pick a time range to view revenue and order counts across the latest 7 days, 4 weeks, 6 months, and 5 years.

header.description: Tap each step to view the full journey — from customer booking to staff service.

reservations.done_message: Flow complete — customer has been successfully served

step_1.label: Step 1
step_1.title: Customer books a table
step_1.summary: Choose time, guest count, and a suitable table

select_time.heading: Select time & party size
select_time.body: Customers select arrival date, time, and number of guests. The system shows real-time available slots.

select_table.heading: Choose a table on the floor plan
select_table.body: After selecting time, customers view the floor layout and choose a table. Reserved or busy tables are hidden automatically.

view_360.heading: View 360° table perspective
view_360.body: Before confirming, customers can rotate and preview the real view from that table to choose confidently.

confirm.heading: Confirm reservation
confirm.body: Customers enter contact details and submit the booking. The request is sent to the restaurant instantly.

step_2.label: Step 2
step_2.title: Restaurant confirms
step_2.summary: Admin reviews and confirms the booking

receive_request.heading: Receive reservation request
receive_request.body: Admins are notified immediately on new requests. The list shows full details: guest name, time, party size, and selected table.

confirm_or_adjust.heading: Confirm or adjust
confirm_or_adjust.body: Admins can confirm the reservation or suggest alternate table/time when needed. Customers receive updates instantly.

assign_staff.heading: Assign staff
assign_staff.body: After confirmation, admins can assign staff to the table for timely guest reception.

step_3.label: Step 3
step_3.title: Staff welcomes guests
step_3.summary: Check in and guide guests to their reserved table

checkin.heading: Check in arrivals
checkin.body: Staff can search by name or booking code, verify identity, and mark guests as arrived in the system.

guide_to_table.heading: Guide guests to table
guide_to_table.body: The system highlights the reserved table on the layout so staff can guide guests without re-checking.

update_table_status.heading: Update table status
update_table_status.body: The table automatically changes to "Dining" and all departments are updated in real time.

section_1.description: Restaurant owners can upload real floor images and place/name tables directly on the map. Customers see the exact seating location when booking — no confusion and no wasted time.

highlights.upload_floor_map: Upload floor plan images for each level (PNG, JPG)
highlights.add_and_name_table: Add and name tables by area
highlights.real_position_view: Customers see their exact seating location

panorama.description: Owners upload 360° images per table so customers can rotate and preview the real viewpoint before booking. No surprises on arrival — guests know exactly where they will sit and what they will see.

highlights.upload_360: Upload 360° image for each table (JPG equirectangular)
highlights.rotate_preview: Guests can rotate and preview before booking
highlights.increase_conversion: Increase reservation conversion with realistic previews

qr.description: Guests scan the QR code at the table to open the menu instantly — no app and no staff assistance required. Each order is bound to the correct table and area to remove serving mistakes.

highlights.unique_qr_per_table: Each table has an independent QR code
highlights.auto_bind_order: Orders are automatically attached to the correct table
highlights.faster_service: Faster service with better staff focus

1.title: Design floor layout
1.description: Owners upload floor images and arrange tables visually with drag and drop.

2.title: Real-time table status
2.description: Staff track each table status — available, occupied, reserved, or cleaning.

3.title: Smart seating
3.description: Customers identify seats easily while staff allocate tables quickly and efficiently.

step_1.description: Create and arrange flexible categories — Main dishes, Appetizers, Desserts, Drinks. Add items to each group with full details and images.

bullets.reorder_display: Reorder display sequence via drag and drop

step_2.description: Add, edit, and control each dish with complete details: name, description, price, image, and real-time visibility status.

bullets.attach_multi_category: Attach one dish to multiple categories

step_3.description: Bind ingredients to each dish and track stock in real time. The system automatically alerts when stock runs low so the kitchen can act early.

bullets.bind_ingredients: Bind specific ingredients to each dish
bullets.auto_hide_out_of_stock: Automatically hide dishes when ingredients run out

section_1.title: Instant QR ordering
section_1.description: Customers simply scan the QR code at the table, browse the full menu, and place orders on their phone — no app and no waiting for staff.

qr.title: Instant QR scan
qr.description: Each table has its own QR code. Scan and open the menu immediately without app download or sign-in.

realtime.title: Real-time updates
realtime.description: Dish status and ready-to-serve notifications are shown directly on the customer's phone.

loyalty.title: Automatic loyalty points
loyalty.description: Every order automatically earns member points. Customers can track points and redeem offers at the table.

section_2.title: Membership tiers & exclusive offers
section_2.description: Membership tiers are upgraded automatically based on spending. The higher the tier, the better the perks.

section_3.title: AI assistant suggests dishes by preference
section_3.description: AI understands preferences, diet, and budget to suggest the best dishes — like a food-savvy companion.

bullets.preferences: Suggestions by taste, allergy, and diet
bullets.instant_reply: Instant replies without waiting for staff
bullets.personalization: Learns from order history for personalized recommendations

section_4.title: Track your order transparently step by step
section_4.description: Customers can see full order details, dish status, total amount, and loyalty points without asking staff.

bullets.order_status: Ordered items list with real-time status
bullets.edit_cancel: Edit or cancel dishes before kitchen confirmation
bullets.bill_discount: View total bill and membership discount

messages.1: I want something light and low-calorie.
messages.2: I suggest Salmon Salad or Pumpkin Soup — low-calorie, nutritious, and great for dinner.
messages.3: Do you have options for vegetarians?
messages.4: Yes! Mushroom Tofu, Grilled Vegetables, and Brown Rice are all great vegetarian choices.

hero.description: A complete staff management system — from account creation and permissions to order handling and table-side payment.

section_1.title: Create and manage staff accounts
section_1.description: Owners create accounts, assign permissions, and manage all staff in one place. Each employee gets a role-specific dashboard.

bullets.create_account: Create new staff accounts in seconds
bullets.edit_disable: Edit profile, reset password, disable account

terminal.note: ID: STF-00142 | Temporary password sent by email.

section_2.title: Table-side staff operations
section_2.description: Staff handle the full service flow — from check-in to ordering, editing, and cancellation — all in one simple interface.

bullets.checkin: Check in guests, open table, start service
bullets.add_items: Add items at any time during service
bullets.cancel_items: Cancel items with reason and sync to kitchen instantly
bullets.update_qty_note: Update quantities and special notes per item

section_3.title: Flexible payments
section_3.description: Support multiple payment methods from cash to QR transfer. The system auto-calculates, issues invoice, and updates loyalty points.

bullets.cash: Fast cash payment with instant table-side receipt
bullets.transfer: QR transfer with instant auto confirmation
bullets.loyalty_points: Auto-earn loyalty points after each successful payment

strategyReport.title: AI Strategy Report
strategyReport.subtitle: Monitor platform performance and tenant analytics
strategyReport.dailySummaryDesc: Yesterday's report provides a summary view (above). Select 'Month' or 'Year' to see detailed charts
